records.question: Please list the reference names of the drivers who are eliminated in the first period in race number 20.

treatment.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT drivers.driverref
FROM qualifying
JOIN drivers ON qualifying.driverid = drivers.driverid
JOIN races ON qualifying.raceid = races.raceid
WHERE races.round = 20 AND qualifying.position > 15

baseline.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT drivers.driverref
FROM qualifying
JOIN drivers ON qualifying.driverid = drivers.driverid
JOIN races ON qualifying.raceid = races.raceid
WHERE races.round = 20 AND qualifying.position >= 17 AND qualifying.q1 LIKE '%'

JOIN races ON qualifying.raceid = races.raceid

JOIN races ON laptimes.raceid = races.raceid

records.question: As of the present, what is the full name of the youngest racer? Indicate her nationality and the name of the race to which he/she first joined.

treatment.sql:

FROM laptimes

JOIN races ON laptimes.raceid = races.raceid
ORDER BY drivers.dob DESC, races.date ASC

records.question: How many accidents did the driver who had the highest number accidents in the Canadian Grand Prix have?

treatment.sql:
SELECT laptimes.driverid AS driverid, COUNT(laptimes.driverid) AS accident_count
FROM laptimes
JOIN races ON laptimes.raceid = races.raceid
WHERE races.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix'
GROUP BY laptimes.driverid
ORDER BY accident_count DESC
LIMIT 1

baseline.sql:

FROM laptimes

JOIN races ON laptimes.raceid = races.raceid
WHERE races.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix'
GROUP BY drivers.driverid
LIMIT 10

records.question: Which top 20 driver created the shortest lap time ever record in a Formula_1 race? Please give them full names.

treatment.sql:
SELECT drivers.forename, drivers.surname
FROM laptimes
JOIN drivers ON laptimes.driverid = drivers.driverid
WHERE laptimes.position <= 20
ORDER BY laptimes.milliseconds ASC
LIMIT 1

records.question: Please list the lap records for the circuits in Italy.

treatment.sql:
SELECT circuits.name AS name, MIN(laptimes.milliseconds) AS best_lap_time_ms
FROM laptimes
JOIN races ON laptimes.raceid = races.raceid
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitid = circuits.circuitid
WHERE circuits.country = 'Italy'
GROUP BY circuits.name
